signals.raw:
Bitcoin "Uptober" Rally | NO | MED confidence**  
Historical October averages show Bitcoin up 22% over five years, but recent analyses highlight wipeouts, $20B liquidations, and no new all-time highs for ETH/BTC in October, with slides persisting despite Fed moves (e.g., QT end).[3][4]
